# Tycoons Investments

Tycoons Investments is an Egyptian real estate brokerage and AI-assisted property search platform.

Primary website: https://tycoons-inv.de/
Arabic directory: https://tycoons-inv.de/ar/
English directory: https://tycoons-inv.de/en/

## Main services
- Search confirmed property inventory in Egypt.
- Compare projects and units by price, area, location, delivery, finishing, and payment plan.
- Help buyers understand which property fits their residential or investment goals.
- Continue with the Tycoons sales team through WhatsApp.

## Main locations
- New Cairo
- Mostakbal City
- North Coast
- Sheikh Zayed
- Ain Sokhna
- New Administrative Capital

## Data notes
Property availability, prices, payment plans, and delivery details may change. Visitors should confirm the latest information with Tycoons Investments through WhatsApp.

## Contact
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/201200704344
